consigna: Escribe un email a un amigo contándole un viaje que hiciste y tus planes para el futuro.
respuestaModelo: Hi! Last year I went to Canada. I visited museums and I ate a lot of good food. I'm going to study French next year because I want to live there. I'm going to practise every day. What are your plans?
checklist: Usé un saludo y una despedida
Usé un verbo en pasado (regular o irregular)
Usé going to para un plan futuro
